notes: Runs against the fixture KB. Profile has funding_required: true. Candidates include a strong-fit Levine (selective, do-not-email, funding unknown), funded Garcia/O'Keefe, a weak-fit Chen, and a strong-fit-but-self-funded Pike that must be dropped. Assertion kinds: file/chat/schema as in the other eval sets.

evals.name: rank-with-funding-dealbreaker
evals.prompt: Rank my PhD options and tell me where to focus. Everything is already in my knowledge base.
evals.expected_output: A ranked shortlist in knowledge-base/openings/_ranking.md that applies funding_required as a HARD filter (drops the self-funded Pike option even though its fit is high), does not simply sort by fit_score (a funded option outranks higher-fit-but-unfunded Levine), flags Levine as a selective reach, gives per-item rationale, and ends with a portfolio-balance note.

assertions.text: Writes knowledge-base/openings/_ranking.md with a ranked table and per-item rationale
Drops the self-funded Pike opening as a dealbreaker (not merely ranks it low) and says why
Does NOT just sort by fit_score (a funded option is placed above higher-fit unfunded Levine)
Flags Levine as a selective reach / gives sober admission realism
Reuses typed signals (fit_score, funding, admission_model) rather than re-deriving them
Includes a portfolio-balance note (reaches vs. realistic targets)

evals.name: needs-analysis-missing-data
evals.prompt: Add Professor Anika Bose at MIT to the comparison and rank her against my current shortlist — she works on tactile sensing for manipulation.
evals.expected_output: Bose has no professor profile in the knowledge base. The ranker must not invent a fit_score or funding signal for her. It should mark her 'needs analysis', either rank provisionally with explicit low confidence or recommend running professor-analyzer first, and rank the rest normally.

assertions.text: Marks the un-analyzed professor as 'needs analysis' instead of inventing scores
Recommends running professor-analyzer for the missing candidate
Still produces an honest ranking of the candidates that DO have profiles
_ranking.md remains schema-faithful and does not assert guessed numbers as grounded
